commands: VERSION=$(grep -m1 'version' packages/docker/chisel-ubuntu-axum/version.toml | sed 's/.*"\(.*\)"/\1/') && docker tag ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:24.04-builder ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:${VERSION}-builder && echo "Tagged builder as ${VERSION}-builder"

VERSION=$(grep -m1 'version' packages/docker/chisel-ubuntu-axum/version.toml | sed 's/.*"\(.*\)"/\1/') && docker tag ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:24.04-builder ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:${VERSION}-builder && docker push ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:${VERSION}-builder && echo "Published builder as ${VERSION}-builder"
docker inspect ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:24.04 --format '{{.Config.User}}' | grep -q 10001 && echo 'PASS: non-root user 10001'
docker inspect ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:24.04 --format '{{.Config.WorkingDir}}' | grep -q /app && echo 'PASS: workdir /app'
docker inspect ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:24.04 --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' | grep -q LD_PRELOAD && echo 'PASS: jemalloc LD_PRELOAD set'
docker inspect ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:24.04 --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' | grep -q MALLOC_CONF && echo 'PASS: jemalloc MALLOC_CONF set'

docker create --name chisel-runtime-test ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:24.04 true > /dev/null 2>&1 && docker export chisel-runtime-test | tar -t | grep -q libjemalloc && echo 'PASS: libjemalloc.so present' && docker rm chisel-runtime-test > /dev/null 2>&1

docker create --name chisel-runtime-test2 ghcr.io/kbve/chisel-ubuntu-axum:24.04 true > /dev/null 2>&1 && docker export chisel-runtime-test2 | tar -t | grep -q libpq && echo 'PASS: libpq.so present' && docker rm chisel-runtime-test2 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo '=== All chisel base image tests passed ==='
echo 'Runtime: user, workdir, jemalloc, libpq OK'
echo 'Builder: cargo, cargo-chef, node, pnpm, protoc, libpq-dev OK'
